Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aila Escalon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Aila is a character who possesses an internal Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Aila's body is almost entirely made of high-grade Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Aila Escalon is a Combat Artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Aila Escalon can pull a force-blade from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Aila Escalon uses the Watchtower Stance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Aila struck with the Zenith Blade to begin a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 13''' — Aila is a ten-year-old girl with brown hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 13''' — Aila can grow four hands from her back that melt into dark goo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 13''' — Aila has a rare Aethertech affinity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila Escalon launched an attack that shook the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila Escalon is the daughter of Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila Escalon uses a Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila Escalon possesses a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila Escalon is the full name of Aila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Aila has a human form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Aila Escalon has a human form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Aila Escalon was dragging the ship into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Aila was waiting in a life-pod for the Lichborn crews to remove her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Aila has joined the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Aila Escalon is piloting a star-fighter and stands in the way of the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila is a member of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila uses a Combat Art to reflect missiles into energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila's vision is based on augmentations similar to Omega's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila can strike through the Absolute Burial spell with multiple Zenith Blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila's chest was pierced by beams of white light from behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila can execute strikes of her Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila has Aethertech augmentations in her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila possesses the Zenith Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila can split into clones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila's regeneration mass is stored in a pocket of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila uses the Hallow Divide to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Aila fought Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 33''' — Aila's eyes burn orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 33''' — Aila required induced artificial aging to grow past the age of ten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Aila has made hunting Omega's ancient enemies difficult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Aila can be called back when an alert is made.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Aila Escalon's eyes glow with orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Aila Escalon can use the Hallow Divide ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Aila Escalon has fought Raion, Sola, Omega, and Horizon simultaneously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Aila's father is mentioned by Aila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Aila can manifest an orange shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Aila is fighting the Red Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Aila withdrew the Zenith Blade and stood next to Zykaros.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Aila Escalon is an enemy who can pass through Subspace and carries a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Aila Escalon has two remaining clones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Aila's body was partially blown apart by Starhammer's fist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Aila's wounds dissolve into black ooze and begin to regenerate immediately.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Aila used the Zenith Blade for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Sola had been fighting Aila.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
